description_long: This is a large, classic-style van with a two-tone paint job, featuring a maroon upper section and a white lower body. The van has a long, extended cab with four side doors and a spacious, open cargo bed at the rear, reminiscent of a pickup truck bed. The front end is characterized by a wide, rectangular grille and dual headlights, with side mirrors extending outward for enhanced visibility. The windows are tinted black, and the vehicle sits on robust black tires with metallic hubcaps. Chrome accents are visible on the bumpers, door handles, and side mirrors, adding a touch of vintage flair. The overall design suggests a utilitarian vehicle suitable for both passenger and cargo transport in urban environments.
description: A vintage, two-tone van with a maroon top and white body, featuring four doors and an open cargo bed. It has tinted windows, chrome accents, and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the van, highlighting the four doors, maroon roof, and open cargo bed.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, taillights, and rear bumper, with the maroon roof visible above the cab.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the four doors, maroon roof, and open cargo bed from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the wide grille, dual headlights, chrome bumper, and extended side mirrors.
attribute_door_configuration: four front-hinged side doors, one tailgate
